title: Federal Laser Product Performance Standards (FLPPS)
content:
FLPPS for Manufacturers:

FLPPS (Federal Laser Product Performance Standards under 21 CFR 1040) applies to manufacturers offering laser products for sale in the United States. Key requirements include:

- Laser housing interlocks
- Remote electrical interlocks
- Proper labeling
- Power classification

FLPPS for In-House Laser Construction:

Every effort should be made to meet the intent of FLPPS when a facility constructs a laser or laser enclosure for its own use. With increased availability of high-power laser diodes, individuals can construct Class 3B or Class 4 lasers without knowledge of laser physics or safety.

ANSI Z136.1 Adoption of FLPPS:

A facility that fully adopts ANSI Z136.1 is effectively adopting FLPPS. Most FLPPS requirements are repeated (almost verbatim) in section 4.3 of ANSI Z136.1-2014.

Specific FLPPS sections in ANSI Z136.1:
Sections 4.3.1, 4.3.2, 4.3.3, 4.3.4, 4.3.5.1, 4.3.7, 4.3.8, and 4.3.14 are FLPPS specifications expected to exist as performance features in commercially certified products.

Verification Requirements:

These items should be verified upon receipt of a laser and checked periodically. If the laser or system is built in-house, full compliance is expected.
plain_language_summary: FLPPS is like the 'building code' for laser products. If you sell lasers, you must build them to this code. If you build lasers for your own use, you should still follow this code for safety.

laser_housing_interlocks.requirement: Housing must have interlocks that disable laser when opened

remote_electrical_interlocks.requirement: External connector for safety system integration
remote_electrical_interlocks.why: Allows connection to door interlocks, E-stops, etc.

labeling.requirement: Specific warning labels and classification markings
labeling.why: Alerts users to hazards and proper precautions

power_classification.why: Ensures safety features match hazard level

ansi_flpps_relationship.key_insight: A facility that fully adopts ANSI Z136.1 is effectively adopting FLPPS
ansi_flpps_relationship.why: Most FLPPS requirements are repeated (almost verbatim) in ANSI Z136.1 section 4.3
ansi_flpps_relationship.benefit: Following ANSI automatically ensures FLPPS compliance for end users

specific_sections.description: These ANSI sections contain FLPPS specifications expected in commercial products:
specific_sections.action: Verify these features exist upon receipt of laser; check periodically

in_house_construction_guidance.warning: With increased availability of high-power laser diodes, anyone can build Class 3B/4 lasers
in_house_construction_guidance.risk: Individuals can construct dangerous lasers without knowledge of laser physics or safety
in_house_construction_guidance.requirement: Every effort should be made to meet FLPPS intent for in-house construction
in_house_construction_guidance.lso_role: LSO must monitor and enforce safety for custom-built systems
in_house_construction_guidance.compliance_level: Full FLPPS compliance expected for in-house systems
